services.card_portfolio_desc: A clean, fast, and professional digital presence. Ideal for service providers who want to be found online and build credibility.

process.title: From zero to live in days
process.subtitle: A clear and collaborative process so you always know what's happening.
process.step1_desc: We align ideas, goals, and the best approach for your project.
process.step2_desc: You provide content and references. We define the structure together before development begins.
process.step3_desc: Design, code, SEO, and integrations. Everything built to perform and convert.
process.step4_desc: You review the beta version and we make adjustments together. Up to 2 rounds included.
process.step5_desc: Deploy, domain setup, and delivery. Your solution goes live.
process.step6_desc: Optional monthly plan for hosting, security updates, and continuous improvements.

about.title: Digital solutions that generate real results
about.body: Duete Solutions was born from the belief that digitalizing a business goes far beyond having a website. We help companies build a solid and strategic digital presence that attracts customers and drives real growth.
about.bullet1_text: : your business knowledge combined with our execution.
about.bullet2_text: : every project is built from scratch, tailored to your brand.
about.bullet3_text: : solutions built to rank on Google and convert visitors into customers.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need to provide the content?
faq.a1: Yes, but we can help. You provide basic texts and images, and we take care of the structure, copywriting, and visual optimization.
faq.a2: On average 10 to 15 business days after briefing approval. More complex projects may take up to 30 days.
faq.q3: Is the monthly maintenance plan required?
faq.a3: No, it's optional. We offer a monthly plan starting at R$97 that includes hosting, updates, and ongoing support.
faq.q4: Will you offer video and social media in the future?
faq.a4: Yes! Video production and social media management are already in our plans for soon. Stay tuned.
faq.a5: Not yet, but it's in development. We currently focus on organic SEO and on-site conversion.

package.cta_subtitle: Get in touch and receive a free audit of your project.

portfolio.name: Portfolio Website
portfolio.subtitle: A clean, fast, and professional digital presence. Ideal for service providers who want to be found online and build credibility.
features: Delivery in up to 15 business days

timeline.title: Briefing
timeline.description: You share content and references. We align the structure and goals of the site.

timeline.title: Design
timeline.description: We create a custom layout based on your brand, focused on clarity and conversion.

timeline.title: Development
timeline.description: We implement the design in code, with technical SEO, contact form, and performance optimization.

timeline.title: Review
timeline.description: You review and we approve together. Up to 2 rounds of adjustments included.

timeline.title: Launch
timeline.description: Deploy to your domain with SSL certificate. Your site goes live.

faq.question: Which sections are included?
faq.answer: The package includes up to 5 sections (e.g. Hero, About, Services, Testimonials, and Contact). Additional sections can be quoted separately.

faq.question: Do I need domain and hosting?
faq.answer: No. We handle all the configuration. If you already have a domain, just transfer access. If not, we'll guide you through the purchase.

faq.question: Can I update the site myself afterwards?
faq.answer: Yes. We deliver the source code and can set up a simple editing panel if needed.

faq.question: What is the delivery timeframe?
faq.answer: On average 10 to 15 business days after briefing approval.

landing.name: Landing Page Pro
landing.subtitle: A complete digital solution focused on conversion: advanced SEO, contact form, domain setup, and guaranteed high performance.
features: Delivery in up to 15 business days

timeline.title: Strategic briefing
timeline.description: We map your audience, competitors, and conversion goals before starting.

timeline.title: Copywriting + Design
timeline.description: We create persuasive copy and a layout optimized to maximize conversion.

timeline.title: Development
timeline.description: Clean, performant code with advanced SEO, integrations, and configured metrics.

timeline.title: Review
timeline.description: You review and we approve together. Up to 2 rounds of adjustments included.

timeline.title: Launch + Analytics
timeline.description: Deploy with SSL, Google Analytics, and Search Console to track your results.

faq.question: What's the difference from Portfolio?
faq.answer: Landing Page Pro is focused on conversion with advanced SEO, unlimited sections, strategic copywriting, and metrics tool integration.

faq.question: Can I use my current domain?
faq.answer: Yes, just give us access to your domain panel and we'll handle everything.

faq.question: Does it include paid traffic management?
faq.answer: No. The package focuses on organic conversion. Paid traffic management is a separate service.

faq.question: What is the delivery timeframe?
faq.answer: On average 10 to 15 business days after briefing approval.
